loop1.title: UPS Capacity
loop1.note: Showing capacity scores derived from active power and nameplate ratings; current-based score uses active power as a proxy for current load factor as direct current-to-rated-current ratio is not a standard library fn for this specific 'Current(I) Score' slot, though current_max is available. Delta label is omitted as no time-series comparison is requested.

loop1.title: UPS Load
loop1.note: Showing current load % and 30-day load % trend; sparkline labels are preserved from fixture defaults as the flat kW array is reset to const to maintain sparkline chrome.

loop1.title: Output Load & Capacity — Composite
loop1.note: Showing output load (kW) and bypass frequency (Hz) — bypass voltage and readiness floor are not directly measured/static values for this asset.
